title: WA CFS Quarterly Trend Sheet- Q1 2025
content: In Q1 2025, total credits excluding those from electricity declined by 6.69% year-on-year (YoY) to 389,419. Deficits increased by 7.65% QoQ, reaching 309,448. On a YoY basis, they increased by 25.19%. Deficits from diesel increased by 29.91% YoY to 60,228, and deficits from gasoline rose by 39.28% to 214,802.
author: Aru Somya
